articles.title: X is rolling out automatic translation and photo editing powered by Grok
articles.description: New automatic translations and photo editing on X are powered by the company's flagship AI model.
articles.summary: X is implementing automatic translation and image enhancement features using its own advanced artificial intelligence system.
points: Google has developed an automated feature to translate content in real time on X platform without needing users' consent or knowledge.
The photo editing tool can automatically adjust brightness, contrast, saturation and sharpness of photos using AI
AI-powered automatic translation will be available for 14 languages initially with plans to expand the number
articles.insight: Google'suite’s capability in developing advanced tools can revolutionize content sharing on X platform, making it more accessible and universally understood. However, its impact may raise privacy concerns as users might not be aware of their data being used for translation purposes.

articles.title: 위드네트웍스 ‘위드 VTM V3.0’, GS인증 1등급 획득
articles.description: 서버 넘어 앱·프로세스 등 논리적 자산까지 통합 관리... AI 위험도 스코어링(VRS) 탑재한국주택금융공사 공급 이어 국가 공인 품질 입증, 조달청 나라장터 등록 추진[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 위드네트웍스는 자사의 자산 및 보안 취약점 통합 관리 솔루션 ‘withVTM V3.0’이 한국산업기술시험원(KTL)으로부터 소프트웨어 품질인증(GS) 1등급을 획득했
articles.summary: 위드네트웍스는 자사의 보안 취약점과 IT 시스템이 수집한 자산 통합 관리 있음을 인식하여 'withVTM V30'를 소프트웨어 품질 인증(GS)에 등수로 이러한 기술적 시스템의 이벤트를 통합 시스템으로 강화
points: 위드네트웍스는 IT 시스템을 활용해보니 'withVTM V3.0'이 서비스에 수집한 자산과 보안 취약점을 통합 가능성을 제공
위드네트웍스는 'withVTM V3.0'이 기술적 시스템의 이벤트를 완화하고 IT 시스템에서의 자산 수집, 보안 관리를 심도충전하지 않거나 소프트웨어 품질인증(GS)이 듣기로 선택하여
위드네트웍스는 'withVTM V3.0'에서 활용되는 AI 기반 보안을 지원하며, 한국주택금융공사 공급과 조심한 보호적 취약점이 모여있음
articles.insight: 위드네트웍스는 'withVTM V3.0'로 IT 시스템의 자산 수집과 보안 취약점을 다음염려로 강화하여, GS인증을 실시키는 것이 IT/기술 업계에서 중요한 일은 현在 그룹이 아니면 다음염려로 진전

articles.title: How nuclear batteries could speed the race to fusion power
articles.description: Avalanche Energy is working on an DARPA project to build a new class of materials capable of turning damaging radiation into electricity.
articles.summary: A company called Avalanche Energy is developing nuclear batteries for space applications as part of DARPA'selong project to harness high-energy radiation into power sources.
points: Avalanche Energy aims to create an energy storage system that converts damaging radiation, typically found in fusion environments, into usable electricity. This innovation could be pivotal for long missions and is part of DARPA's broader initiative focusing on nuclear power generation.

The company has received funding from the US government to pioneer this technology with hopes that it will accelerate human accessibility into space, as well as provide clean energy solutions back on Earth. The prototype batteries are being designed for use in environments where traditional power sources would be impractical or impossible.

With fusion power still largely experimental and the current global emphasis shifting towards sustainable and green technologies, these nuclear batteries could play a key role not just in space exploration but also contribute to Earth's clean energy landscape.
articles.insight: The development of radiation-resistant battery technology by Avalanche Energy has the potential to speed up fusion power projects both for deep space missions and as sustainable, terrestrial energy solutions. This advancement represents a significant step forward in solving two major technological challenges simultaneously.

articles.title: 중국 배후 해킹그룹 Storm-1175, 제로데이로 랜섬웨어 무차별 살포
articles.description: 마이크로소프트 분석 결과, CVE-2025-10035 등 패치 전 제로데이 결함 악용 확인침투 성공 후 24시간 내 메두사 랜섬웨어 배포... 미국·영국·호주 의료·금융 정밀 타격[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 중국 정부와 연계된 고도화된 해킹 조직 ‘Storm-1175’가 제로데이(Zero-Day) 및 N-데이 취약점을 정교하게 조합한 초고속 공격을 전개하며 글
articles.summary: 중국의 'Storm-1175' 조직이 제로데이 취약점을 조합한다.
points: Storm-1175 조직은 기술적인 악용으로, CVE-2025-10035과 같은 Zero-Day 및 N-Day vulnerabilities을 활용한다.
이러한 강요성을 통해 중국 정부와의 연계가 있어, 국제적인 위기시도를 시작한다.
미국, 영국, 호주에서는 반드시 우리나라 정부와의 이야할 수 0가지한다.
articles.insight: 중국이 제로데이에 대한 취약점을 통해 국제적인 위기시도를 시작한다. 마이크로소프트의 패치격정에 대비해야 합니다.

articles.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
articles.description: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.
articles.summary: Google has quietly rolled out an Artificial Intelligence (AI) driven dictation application that operates without internet access. It uses Gemma AI models and is positioned as a competitor to apps like Wispr Flow.
points: Google's offline-first dictation app was quietly launched, utilizing Gemma AI for voice recognition tasks with no need for an internet connection
The new Google service shows significant improvement in transcription accuracy compared to previous iterations or competing tools like Wispr Flow.
Launched without much fanfare on the Play Store and through email invitations initially, this app signifies a growing demand within the technology sector for reliable offline AI dictation options.
articles.insight: Google's launch of an offline-first dictation application reflects increased market competition in voice recognition technologies. This shift indicates that consumers and businesses are seeking more accessible, efficient tools capable of working independently from internet connectivity to facilitate productivity on the go.

articles.title: ADT캡스, ‘오늘도 무사출동’ 캠페인으로 현장 안전 체계 강화
articles.description: 에어백 조끼 지급·안전 교육 등 다각적 안전 활동 전개출동 과정 전반 안전성 강화 및 안전관리 체계 고도화VR 기반 체험형 교육·조직 정비로 기업 안전 역량 제고[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] SK쉴더스(대표 민기식)의 물리보안 브랜드 ADT캡스가 현장 구성원의 안전관리 강화를 위해 ‘오늘도 무사출동’ 캠페인을 진행한다고 7일 밝혔다.최근 산업 현장 전반에서 안전
articles.summary: ADT캡스가 현장 안전 체계 강화에 필요한 '오늘도 무사출동' 캠펭를 진행함으로써, 산업 현장 안전성을 위해 고려해나석한다.
points: ADT캡스는 정보체계 프로그래밍과 함께 '오늘도 무사출동'을 진행하여, 산업 안전성을 강화하기로 한다.
산업 현장에서는 보호체계가 중요하고, ADT캡스의 커뮤니킷이 그 강제를 전환시킵니다.
VR기발과 교육을 이용한 안전 교육 방식은, 현장 사람들에게 안전한 시스텟 설정 제출을 위해 도구가 되고 있다.
articles.insight: 산업 현장에서의 보호체계, ADT캡스이 강화한 안전 채널이 필요하다는 사상을 가진다.

articles.description: 김진만 KISA AI보안인재단장 “BoB DNA인 기술적 깊이 유지하고, 산업적 통찰 융합이 핵심”해킹 넘어 클라우드·AI 시대 최적화된 차세대 정보보호 리더 양성기업이 커리큘럼 만들고 채용까지 연계한 선순환 취업·창업 모델 가동[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “국가의 세금이 투입되어 양성된 최정예 인재들입니다. 단순히 교육으로 끝나는 것이 아니라, 이들이 대한민

articles.title: MS·구글·애플 총출동... 앤트로픽 주도 보안 프로젝트 ‘글래스윙’ 닻 올렸다
articles.description: 일반 공개 없는 특수 모델 투입해 수천 건의 제로데이 취약점 조기 식별참여 기관과 오픈소스 진영에 최대 1억달러 크레딧 및 400만달러 현금 기부[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 클로드(Claude) 개발사인 앤트로픽(Anthropic)이 전 세계 핵심 소프트웨어 보안 강화를 목표로 하는 이니셔티브 ‘프로젝트 글래스윙’(Project Glasswing) 출범을 4월
articles.summary: Anthropic이 개인적으로 계약을 위해 프로젝트 'Project Glasswing'를 개발하여, 보안성의 뛰어 IETF 공개 API를 사용합니다.
points: Anthropic에서 개인적으로 계약을 위해 'Project Glasswing' 출범
작성되는 소프트웨어는 인공지능(AI)를 기반으로 하여 보안성을 강화
이 새 업계에서의 주요 기능은 자연어처리(NLP)와 익스크된 인공지능(xAI)로 제시됩니다.
articles.insight: 이러한 출동은 Anthropic이 IT/기술 업계에서 보안성을 최신화하고자 하는 것이 아닙니다. 대중과 인공지능이 균형을 바꾸더라도, 공개 API는 보안성에 큰 작용을 미칩니다.

articles.title: 충남도, CCTV 6만7500개 엮어 재난 실시간 판단·대응
articles.description: 시군·중앙부처·유관기관 CCTV 연계 ‘종합 모니터링시스템’ 구축재난 현장 인근 CCTV 입체 활용... 초기 투입 자원·조치 등 결정·추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 충남도(도지사 김태흠)가 도내 6만7500여대의 CCTV를 한곳에 모아 재난·재해 상황을 실시간·입체적으로 파악할 수 있는 시스템을 구축했다.복잡·대형화되고 있는 자연·사회 재난 발생 시 상황
articles.summary: 충남도는 6만7500개의 CCTV를 한곳에 모아서 자연상태가 발침하여 재난 현장 인근의 상황을 실시간으로 판단하고 대응하는 시스템을 구축.
points: 충남도가 6만7500개의 CCTV를 한곳에 모아서 재난 현장 인근의 상황을 실시간으로 알아내고 대응하는 시스템을 구축한다.
CCTV를 이용해서 자연·사회 재난 상황에 대한 모니터링을 수동으로 제공하고 자동으로 조치를 점진러내는 방식이다.
시스템은 CCTV의 중간지수에서 변경된 영역을 가장 자연상태와 광고로 매칭시킨다.
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업체에서의 CCTV 기술의 활용과 자동 재난 알맞은 시스템구조에 대해 주요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “착한 AI가 갑자기 욕설을?”… 학습 데이터에 ‘독’ 푸는 데이터 포이즈닝 비상
articles.description: AI 모델의 학습 데이터에 악성 데이터를 교묘하게 주입하여 저작권 침해, 차별, 가짜 뉴스 등 잘못된 결과물을 도출하게 만드는 ‘데이터 포이즈닝’ 공격이 새로운 보안 위협으로 부상했다. 해커는 AI의 기술적 결함보다는 내재된 ‘편향성’을 무기로 삼아 겉보기엔 멀쩡하지만 실제로는 오염된 ‘좀비 AI’를 만들어 기업의 신뢰를 무너뜨릴 수 있다. AI 보안 사고
articles.summary: AI 학습 데이터에 포이즈당한 '오직정' AI가 만들어진다.
points: - 공격자는 AI의 기술적 부창보다는 악성 학습 데이터로 침해를 유발한다.
- '오직정' AI가 잘못된 결과를 도출하여 신뢰를 무너지는 위험을 만든다.
- 이러한 공격은 AI보안에 대한 신뢰가 떨어진다.
articles.insight: AI 보안 문제점을 포컅하는 '데이터 포이즈당' 공격은 IT/기술 엔진에서 광범위한 영향을 미치게 된다.

And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: VC Eclipse has a new $1.3B fund to back — and build — ‘physical AI’ startups
articles.description: Eclipse will put some of that money towards incubating, or building startups.
articles.summary: Venture capital firm Eclipse has raised a $1.3 billion fund focused on backing 'physical AI' startups aimed at creating tangible products and services that incorporate artificial intelligence components.
points: Eclipse is raising its ninth venture round, with an unprecedented $1.3 billion in commitments from more than 50 investors.
The firm plans to use a portion of the capital for startup incubation by building companies that create AI-infused physical solutions.
'Physical AI' refers to tangible products and services, not just software or cloud-based offerings.
articles.insight: This move reflects a growing trend in the technology industry towards integrating artificial intelligence with hardware. It highlights an emerging sector where startups are actively contributing innovative AI solutions that have real-world applications, which could influence future funding and strategic directions within tech.

articles.title: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn
articles.description: A joint FBI, NSA, and CISA advisory warns that Iranian hackers have "escalated" their tactics in response to the ongoing U.S.-Israel war with Iran.
articles.summary: The US government has issued a joint advisory warning that Iranian hackers are intensifying attacks against American critical infrastructure amid heightened tensions due to the ongoing U.in-Israel conflict.
points: Iranian state-sponsored actors have increased their cyber threats towards US national security systems, energy sector and other key sectors as a response to escalating conflicts between Iran and Israel/USA
The joint advisory warns of the possibility of ransomware attacks on critical infrastructure which could impact public safety in addition to economic implications.

Increased collaboration among US intelligence agencies, including NSA, CISA as well as international partners like Britain's NCSC and Australia’s DIOCER, indicates the urgency of addressing these threats.
articles.insight: The intensified hacking activity by Iranian actors represents a significant threat to US national security. It highlights potential vulnerabilities within critical infrastructure systems that must be addressed through increased collaboration and investment in cybersecurity defenses.

articles.title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI datacenter builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
articles.description: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.
articles.summary: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1. 35 billion in six months

35 billion in six months

articles.title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk’s Terafab chips project
articles.description: The partnership brings semiconductor experience to Musk's latest high-tech project.
articles.summary: Intel has partnered with Elon Musk in a new venture aiming at creating Terafab chips.
points: The Intel-Terafac partnership combines Intel'ries semiconductor experience with the vision of SpaceX founder, Elon Musk
This project could potentially reshape industries reliant on computing power like AI and autonomous vehicles.
Musk’s Terafab chips aim to provide massive parallel processing capabilities.
articles.insight: The Intel-Terafac partnership and Elon Musk's ambition may accelerate advancements in semiconductor technology, which could have far-reaching implications for industries that depend on high processing power. However, the project also faces significant skepticism due to technological constraints.

articles.title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
articles.description: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.
articles.summary: Anthropic has unveiled Mythos, their latest and most powerful AI model designed for enhancing cybersecurity measures of high-profile companies.
points: The preview event took place in Los Angeles with Anthropic's team showcasing the capabilities of its new 'Mythos.'
Anthropic aims to offer this AI model exclusively for defensive cybersecurity purposes among elite organizations.
Unveiling Mythos represents a significant leap forward in artificial intelligence technology and security.
articles.insight: The development of powerful, exclusive AI models like Mythos could significantly alter the landscape of corporate cybersecurity by providing enhanced defensive capabilities against sophisticated threats. It indicates Anthropic's commitment to advancing technology for specific industry needs.

articles.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone is on track to launch in September, report says
articles.description: The news follows a report from Nikkei Asia on Tuesday that raised concerns the company’s foldable iPhone could be delayed due to challenges during the phone’s engineering test phase.
articles.summary: A new report suggests Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone might launch as planned in September despite earlier concerns over delays caused by engine testing issues.
points: Reports indicate potential delay of the foldable iPhone due to engineering challenges
Apple is set to release its first-ever foldable phone, with an expected price tag around $10,000
The device could include two screens and a stylus or one screen that hinges
articles.insight: Despite initial concerns over delays due to engineering challenges faced during the testing phase of Apple's foldable iPhone, it appears set for its planned September release. This development indicates resilience in production and showcases consumer interest despite high price expectations.

articles.title: Russian government hackers broke into thousands of home routers to steal passwords
articles.description: Fancy Bear, also known as APT28, has taken over thousands of residential home routers to steal passwords and authentication tokens in a wide-ranging espionage operation.
articles.summary: Russian government hackers used the 'Fancy Bear' group (APT28) to conduct extensive cyber espionage by breaching thousands of home routers for password and token collection.
points: The Russian hacker group, Fancy Bear or APT28, is responsible for a wide-ranging hacking operation targeting residential home routers in over 50 countries worldwide. Their primary goal appears to be gathering sensitive information rather than disruption.

This cyber espionage campaign primarily targets businesses but also includes personal devices within corporate networks, with the intent of extracting passwords and authentication tokens for intelligence purposes.
The group utilizes a range of sophisticated hacking techniques to gain access without triggering alarms or being detected by defensive cybersecurity measures.
articles.insight: This operation highlights vulnerabilities in home networks, emphasizing the need for robust security practices and awareness among consumers. It also underscores potential international implications of state-sponsored hacking activities on global IT infrastructure stability.

articles.title: Chrome finally adds a better way to deal with too many open tabs
articles.summary: Google's Chrome browser has introduced new features that help users manage multiple open tabs more efficiently.
points: Chrome now includes an extension called 'Tab Groups', which lets users create and organize separate groups of related tabs for better focus.
The tab group feature is designed to improve productivity by preventing the browser from becoming cluttered with too many open pages, reducing distractions.
This new functionality arrives as part of a broader effort within Google to enhance user experience and efficiency in web browsing.
articles.insight: The introduction of 'Tab Groups' indicates an ongoing industry trend towards improving multitasking capabilities, which may influence competitors like Microsoft Edge to adopt similar features. It highlights the importance for tech companies not only to keep pace with demand but also anticipate user needs in a fast-evolving digital world.

articles.title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
articles.description: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.
articles.summary: In response to an exponential increase in demand for AI services, Anthropic secured larger compute deals with tech giants Google and Broadcom.
points: Anthropic's revenue run-rate has skyrocketed from $30 million at the end of last year to an estimated $30 billion this quarter alone, largely due to increased cloud usage for AI training purposes.
The company secured new compute agreements with tech leaders Google and Broadcom amid a 5x surge in demand over just three months - from August through October.
This deal expansion comes as Anthropic is set to launch its own version of Stable Diffusion, positioning itself competitthyly within the rapidly growing AI industry.
articles.insight: The substantial growth in demand for cloud computing resources reflects a broader trend towards increasing reliance on technology and remote work arrangements across various industries. Companies like Anthropic that can capitalize on this opportunity are likely to become major players within the AI sector.

articles.title: Google Maps can now write captions for your photos using AI

articles.title: A teenage Minecraft YouTuber raised $1,234,567 for a meme prediction market called Giggles. It broke me.
articles.description: Justin Jin’s company Giggles – which he describes as “putting a trading app and TikTok together” – started as a joke.
articles.summary: A teenage Minecraft YouTuber created Giggles, an inside-jokes meme prediction market that raised over $1 million through TikTok.
points: Giggles is a joke within the gaming community about how memes are predicted and shared on social media platforms like Reddit and Twitter.
The platform's creator, Justin Jin (alias 'Justice'), raises funds by mimicking this culture to generate money from his TikTok videos without delivering actual value or services in return.
Giggles has successfully raised over $1.2 million through its satirical approach.
articles.insight: The emergence of Giggles highlights how community-driven and social aspects can generate significant financial success, despite lacking intrinsic value or functionality within the technology sector.

articles.title: 4 days left to save close to $500 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes
articles.description: Four days left to save up to $482 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. These low rates will disappear on April 10 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.
articles.summary: Attendees of TechCrunch Disrupt have a limited time to save nearly $500 on their tickets for the event scheduled in August.
points: Low rates available until April 10 at midnight PT
Cost savings nearing close to $482 per ticket
articles.insight: This limited-time discount offers an opportunity for early birds and budget conscious individuals in the IT industry to secure their spot, while also demonstrating TechCrunch Disrupt'ner interest in maximizing attendance by providing affordable access.

articles.title: Trump administration plans to cut cybersecurity agency’s budget by $700 million
articles.description: The budget proposal would force CISA to operate with a significantly lower budget than previous years, citing the government's claims that the election misinformation programs were used to "target the President."
articles.summary: The Trump administration plans to cut CISA' extramural budget by $700 million amidst allegations of using such campaigns against political opponents.
points: CISA is facing a major reduction in its non-federal funding as part of the proposed budget.
The cutback comes after claims that election misinformation programs targeted President Trump and former Vice President Biden, according to federal prosecutors.
This significant decrease could impact CISA's capability to counter similar threats in future.
articles.insight: If the proposed budget cut is approved, it may weaken national cybersecurity defenses by limiting funding for agencies responsible for protecting election systems and infrastructure against misinformation campaigns.

articles.title: Why a former AirPods engineer is now building heat pumps
articles.description: Merino Energy has simplified the heat pump dramatically in a quest to make them cheaper and easier to install.
articles.summary: A former AirPods engineer is applying their expertise to simplify and reduce costs for heat pumps.
points: Ex-Apple Engineer Alex Siu creates a simplified miniature version of the air handler at Merino Energy
Merino's goal: Cheaper, more user-friendly central heating systems accessible to all homeowners
Miniaturized heat pumps could revolutionize household heating solutions
articles.insight: This innovation from a former tech industry insider signifies potential growth and accessibility in the HVAC sector, making sustainable technology more attainable for mainstream consumers.

articles.title: Waymo opens robotaxi service in Nashville, partners with Lyft
articles.description: Waymo now operates commercial robotaxi services in 11 cities, with various methods to hail.
articles.summary: Waymo has launched a fully driverless robotaxi service in Nashville and partnered with Lyft for wider availability.
points: Commercial operation of Waymo's autonomous vehicle services expanded to include new cities like Nashville
A diverse approach adopted by customers: hailing on-demand, scheduled rides (similarly named 'Wayx') and pre-booked Lyft trips with a detour through the robotaxi service.
Partnership between Waymo'selfs autonomous ride technology business unit and established transportation company Lyft.
articles.insight: The expansion of commercial driverless services like Waymo signifies progress in overcoming technological challenges, although regulatory approval remains a significant hurdle. The partnership with an existing player such as Lyft could help streamline the integration into public transportation systems.

articles.title: Hermeus raises $350M to build autonomous hypersonic fighters
articles.description: The defense aviation startup is coming off two successful flight demonstrations, and with the next one, it's aiming to go supersonic.
articles.summary: Hermeus successfully demonstrated its hypersonic technology at low speeds on January 16th after completing a preliminary flight in October of the previous year.
points: The Hermeus defense aviation startup completed two successful flight demonstrations using their hypersonic air-breathing engine, marking progress towards its goal to build autonomous supersonic fighters and commercial passenger planes that can reach speeds of Mach 4.

Despite previous delays due to a failed test in November at Edwards Air Force Base, the company reported successful takeoffs without human pilots during these demonstrations on January 16th. The next flight is aimed at achieving supersonic speed with an expected top velocity of around Mach 2.

Hermeus has attracted significant interest from investors like Bessemer Venture Partners, Airbus DSCA Research and Innovation Fund LLC (DARPA), Lockheed Martin Astronautics Company, as well as private individuals who invested more than $40 million in the startup.
articles.insight: The successful demonstrations of Hermeus' hypersonic technology have significant implications for both defense and commercial aviation industries. If fully realized, their autonomous supersonic fighters could redefine air combat strategies while their passenger planes promise to revolutionize the speed at which people travel.

articles.title: Spotify’s prompted playlist feature will now work for podcasts, too
articles.description: Spotify will now allow users to input natural language prompts to create podcast playlist.
articles.summary: Spotify is expanding its 'prompted playlist' feature from music tracks to include podcast episodes.
points: The prompted playlist feature will allow users on Spotify to input natural language requests and receive a curated list of related content tailored to their interests, which now includes podcasts in addition to traditional music offerings.

This new direction for the 'prompted playlist' functionality is part of an effort by Spotify to enhance user engagement through more personalized experiences and broaden its audio library beyond just streaming songs or albums.

By integrating this feature with podcasts, which have historically been a growing segment within the digital music ecosystem due to their unique content format that often encourages listener interaction.
articles.insight: This expansion signifies Spotify' endorsing of natural language processing for broader media types and indicates recognition in how auditory entertainment, specifically podcasts, is becoming an increasingly significant part of the company’s business model. It also suggests that there might be further innovations on the horizon as technology continues to evolve.

articles.title: 오픈클로 보안 자문의 경고, “AI는 이제 인간 정체성을 해킹한다”
articles.description: 오픈클로 보안 핵심 관리자가 짚어낸 오펜시브 AI 진화... 전통적 보안 스캐닝 무력화 경고“단 한 번의 침투 막아라”... 투명성·코드 리뷰 아우른 4단계 신뢰 프로그램 역설[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “전통적 취약점 스캐닝의 사대는 완전히 끝났습니다. 앞으로 AI는 웹과 모바일을 넘어 인간의 정체성마저 해킹하는 포괄적 위협으로 진화할 것입니다.”최근 IT
articles.summary: 기사는 AI 진화의 위협성과 인간 정체성을 해제한 변화에대한 주요 내용을 요약합니다.
points: - AI 진화에 대한 공지로 인공지능이 인간의 정체성을 해제하고 있음을 가리켓
- IT 업체에서 AI 전통적인 보안 개신을 인식하며, 공권 위기와 강력한 보호채널이 제시되었음
- AI의 포게절로 인간의 직접 대중화를 방지하여, 악의적인 영향을 미리 예전탭으로 준수한 모습
articles.insight: 이러한 AI 진화는 IT 엔지니어들이 인간의 보호와 공정성에 대해 강력하게 관심을 느끼며, 이를 위한 보호 챔피소드는 필요로 남아있습니다.

articles.title: 명지대 방산안보연구소·새솔테크, 국방 우주·모빌리티 AI 보안 협력
articles.description: 국방 우주·모빌리티 분야 AI·사이버보안 협력 및 인재 양성 협약 체결위성·드론 ISR 및 데이터 기반 보안 기술 공동 연구로 미래 전장 대응 역량 강화 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 명지대학교 방산안보연구소(소장 류연승)는 7일 새솔테크(대표 한준혁)와 ‘국방 우주 및 모빌리티 분야, AI·사이버보안 사업’을 목적으로 업무협약을 체결했다.이번 협약은 급변하
articles.summary: 방산안보연구소와 대표한준혁이 국방우주 및 모빌리티 AI·사이버보안 연구쪽에서 공동연구를 통해, 세계적으로 IT/기술 보안책전을 강화하고자 한국어로 요약
points: 국방우주 및 모빌리티에서 국방 우주·AI·사이버보안 연구쪽으로, 명지대학교 방산안보연구소와 ‘대표한준혁’이 공동 연구를 시작한다.
이 연구는 새솔테크(대표 한준혁)과 결국했다.
세계적으로 IT/기술 보안이 능동적으로 진화하고 있는 우주를 대체로 강조해야 한다.
articles.insight: 인내와 세계사회에서의 IT/기술 논제가 새로운 전시으로 나아오는 현상을 이해하고자 한국어로 질문

articles.title: [배종찬의 보안 빅데이터] 미국과 미군 위협하는 이란 사이버 해킹 부대
articles.description: 2010년 스턱스넷 공격 이후 국가 역량 총동원... ‘디지털 정규군’으로 급성장빅데이터 연관어 분석 결과 ‘강력한 무기”, “우위” 등 사이버 안보 위기감 뚜렷[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 현대 전쟁의 패러다임이 근본적으로 변하고 있다. 과거의 전쟁이 화력과 기동력, 즉 눈에 보이는 물리적 파괴력에 의존했다면, 오늘날의 전쟁은 네트워크와 데이
articles.summary: 2010년 스턱스넷 공격 이후 국가 역량 총동원. ‘디지털 정규군’으로 급성장빅데이터 연관어 분석 결과 ‘강력한 무기”, “우위” 등 사이버 안보 위기감 뚜렷[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 현대 전쟁의 패러다임이 근본적으로 변하고 있다...
points: 2010년 스턱스넷 공격 이후 국가 역량 총동원
‘디지털 정규군’으로 급성장빅데이터 연관어 분석 결과 ‘강력한 무기”, “우위” 등 사이버 안보 위기감 뚜렷[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 현대 전쟁의 패러다임이 근본적...
과거의 전쟁이 화력과 기동력, 즉 눈에 보이는 물리적 파괴력에 의존했다면, 오늘날의 전쟁은 네트워크와 데이
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
articles.description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.
articles.summary: AI startup Rocket has developed a comprehensive analytics tool that offers insights into market trends with the efficiency of AI analysis.
points: Rocket'table provides strategy-focused, real-time competitive intelligence and product building capabilities
The platform is designed to offer businesses detailed McKinsey-style reports at a significantly lower cost using artificial intelligence technology
With Rocket's tool, companies can gain insights into market trends quickly without the need for expensive consultancy services
articles.insight: Rocket’s AI platform disrupts traditional business analysis by providing accurate McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of cost and time. This technology could make such analyses more accessible to small and medium enterprises, driving innovation within the IT industry.

articles.title: 파수 AI, ‘글로벌 인포섹 어워드’ 2관왕... “글로벌 AX 보안 선도”
articles.description: 미국 사이버 디펜스 매거진 주최 어워드서 독창적 기술력 및 혁신성 인정받아챗GPT 등 서비스형 AI 정보 유출 막는 ‘AI-R DLP’와 제로트러스트 기반 ‘FED’ 성과 돋보여[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 파수 AI가 ‘글로벌 인포섹 어워드 2026’에서 2관왕을 차지하며 AI 기술력을 국제 무대에 입증했다. 회사는 이번 수상 실적을 교두보 삼아 전 세계 기업
articles.summary: 미국 사이버 디펜스 매거진 주최 어워드서 독창적 기술력 및 혁신성 인정받아챗GPT 등 서비스형 AI 정보 유출 막는 ‘AI-R DLP’와 제로트러스트 기반 ‘FED’ 성과 돋보여[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 파수 AI가 ‘글로벌 인포섹 어워드 2026’에서 2관왕을 차지하며 AI 기술력을 국제 무대에 입증했다. 회사는 이번 수상 실적을 교두보 삼아 전 세계 기업
points: 회사는 이번 수상 실적을 교두보 삼아 전 세계 기업

articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 유용한 정보인줄 알았는데 광고 지옥... 생활 정보 위장 앱 주의
articles.description: 안랩, 공식 유통되는 과대 광고 모바일 앱 주의 당부[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 정부 보조금, 대출, 공모주 등 생활밀착형 정보를 가장한 과다 광고 앱들이 기승을 부려 주의가 요구된다. 6일 안랩(대표 강석균)은 공식 앱스토어(구글 플레이스토어 및 애플 앱스토어)에서 생활밀착형 정보를 제공하는 것처럼 위장해 과도한 광고를 노출하는 앱을 다수 발견하고 사용자 주
articles.summary: 국민은 대표 강석균이 과대한 광고앱을 어울여 개선 요구를 따릅니다.
points: 과대한 광아로톤과 공모주에 인출되어 사용자의 공격을 위해 조치함
국민은 계좌에 대한 과대 쿠킷에서 광아로톤이나 공모주를 추적합니다.
articles.insight: 국민은 과대한 광아로톤과 공모주에 인출되어 사용자의 공격을 위해 조치함.

articles.title: AI design platform Picsart launches a creator monetization program
articles.description: The program invites creators to create original content with Picsart tools for a specific campaign, share it on their social channels, and earn revenue based on how their audience engages.
articles.summary: The program invites creators to create original content with Picsart tools for a specific campaign, share it on their social channels, and earn revenue based on how their audience engages
